content.en:
**Full Game** (Princess = **9**), **2–6 players**, **21 cards** + **13 ♥** favor tokens. Goal: win rounds and collect enough favor tokens.

1. Give each player a reference card.
2. Shuffle all **21** cards into a deck.
3. Set aside the top card **face down** (unseen). **2 players:** also set aside the next **3 face up**.
4. Deal **1 card** to each player.
5. Whoever most recently hand-wrote a letter goes first.

| Players | ♥ to win |
|:-------:|:--------:|
| 2 | 6 |
| 3 | 5 |
| 4 | 4 |
| 5 | 3 |
| 6 | 3 |
content.zh:
**完整版**（公主 = **9**），**2–6 人**，**21 张牌** + **13 枚 ♥**。目标：赢下轮次并集齐所需好感标记。

1. 每人发一张参考卡。
2. 洗匀全部 **21** 张组成牌堆。
3. 移出牌堆顶 **1 张**（面朝下、不查看）。**双人局：** 再翻开接下来的 **3 张**面朝上。
4. 每人发 **1 张**手牌。
5. 最近亲手写过信的玩家先手。

| 人数 | 所需 ♥ |
|:----:|:------:|
| 2 | 6 |
| 3 | 5 |
| 4 | 4 |
| 5 | 3 |
| 6 | 3 |

content.en:
On your turn:

1. **Draw** 1 card (you now hold 2).
2. **Play** 1 of your two cards face up and **resolve** its effect immediately.
3. Keep the other card in hand. All played/discarded cards stay **visible**.
4. Play continues clockwise.

**Knocked out?** Discard your remaining hand face up (**do not** resolve it — Princess still knocks you out if discarded). You cannot be chosen for effects and skip turns until the next round.
content.zh:
你的回合：

1. **抽** 1 张（手中现有 2 张）。
2. **打出**其中 1 张并**立即结算**效果。
3. 另一张留在手中。所有打出/弃掉的牌保持**可见**。
4. 顺时针轮到下一位。

**出局了？** 将剩余手牌正面朝上弃掉（**不结算**；弃掉公主仍出局）。本轮不能被指定为目标，回合跳过。

label.zh: 间谍 / 守卫 / 神父
男爵 / 侍女 / 王子

content.en:
| Value | Card | Qty | Summary |
|:-----:|------|:---:|--------|
| 9 | **Princess** | 1 | Play/discard → out |
| 8 | **Countess** | 1 | Must play if holding King or Prince |
| 7 | **King** | 1 | Trade hands |
| 6 | **Chancellor** | 2 | Draw 2; keep 1; bottom 2 |
| 5 | **Prince** | 2 | Target discards & redraws |
| 4 | **Handmaid** | 2 | Immune until start of your next turn |
| 3 | **Baron** | 2 | Compare; lower is out |
| 2 | **Priest** | 2 | Peek at a hand |
| 1 | **Guard** | 6 | Guess a non-Guard card |
| 0 | **Spy** | 2 | Sole Spy still in → +1 ♥ |
content.zh:
| 点数 | 卡牌 | 数量 | 简述 |
|:----:|------|:----:|------|
| 9 | **公主** | 1 | 打出/弃掉即出局 |
| 8 | **伯爵夫人** | 1 | 手牌有国王/王子时必须打出 |
| 7 | **国王** | 1 | 与任意未出局玩家交换手牌 |
| 6 | **大臣** | 2 | 抽 2 留 1，其余置于牌堆底 |
| 5 | **王子** | 2 | 指定未出局玩家（含自己）弃牌重抽 |
| 4 | **侍女** | 2 | 下回合开始前免疫指定 |
| 3 | **男爵** | 2 | 秘密比点，低者出局 |
| 2 | **神父** | 2 | 秘密查看一手牌 |
| 1 | **守卫** | 6 | 猜非守卫角色，猜中出局 |
| 0 | **间谍** | 2 | 唯一打出间谍 → +1 ♥ |

label.zh: 间谍 / 守卫 / 神父
男爵 / 侍女 / 王子

title.zh: 间谍 · 守卫 · 神父

content.en:
### Spy (0) ×2
No effect when played. At round end, if you are the **only player still in** who played/discarded a Spy, gain **1 ♥** (does **not** count as winning the round). Two Spies → still only 1 ♥.

### Guard (1) ×6
Choose another player and name a **non-Guard** character. They announce if they hold it; if yes, they are out. All others Handmaid-protected → no effect.

### Priest (2) ×2
Secretly look at another player's hand. Do **not** reveal it to anyone else.
content.zh:
### 间谍（0）×2
打出无即时效果。本轮结束时，若你是**仍在局中唯一**打出/弃过间谍的玩家，得 **1 ♥**（**不算**赢得本轮）。两张间谍也只得 1 枚。

### 守卫（1）×6
选择另一名玩家，说出一种**非守卫**角色。若对方持有该牌则出局。其余皆受侍女保护 → 无效。

### 神父（2）×2
选择另一名玩家，**秘密**查看其手牌。不要向任何人公开。

label.zh: 男爵 / 侍女 / 王子

title.zh: 男爵 · 侍女 · 王子

content.en:
### Baron (3) ×2
Secretly compare hands. **Lower** value is out. Tie → neither out. All others Handmaid-protected → no effect.

### Handmaid (4) ×2
Until the **start** of your next turn, others cannot choose you. If all others are protected: Guard/Priest/Baron/King → no effect; Prince → must choose yourself.

### Prince (5) ×2
Choose any player **including yourself**. They discard face up (**no** play effect) and redraw. Empty deck → draw the face-down set-aside. Forced Princess discard → out, **no** redraw. All others Handmaid-protected → must choose yourself.
content.zh:
### 男爵（3）×2
与指定未出局玩家秘密比点，**较低**者出局；相同则无人出局。其余皆侍女 → 无效。

### 侍女（4）×2
直到你**下一回合开始**，免疫其他玩家技能指定。若其余皆受保护：守卫/神父/男爵/国王 → 无效；王子 → 必须指定自己。

### 王子（5）×2
指定任意未出局玩家（**含自己**）弃牌重抽（**不结算**弃牌效果）。牌堆空则抽开局面朝下移出的那张。弃掉公主 → 立即出局且**不再重抽**。其余皆侍女 → 必须指定自己。

label.zh: 间谍 / 守卫 / 神父

title.zh: 大臣 · 国王 · 伯爵夫人 · 公主

content.en:
### Chancellor (6) ×2
Draw 2 (hold 3). **Keep 1**; put the other **2 face down on the bottom** in any order. Only 1 card in deck → draw it and return 1. Empty deck → no effect. Countess force-play does **not** apply while resolving Chancellor.

### King (7) ×1
Trade hands with another player. All others Handmaid-protected → no effect.

### Countess (8) ×1
No effect when played. **Must** play if other card is King or Prince; may play voluntarily. Do not reveal your other card.

### Princess (9) ×1
Play or discard **for any reason** → immediately out.

**Tip:** Highest value at reveal — deadly if forced to discard.
content.zh:
### 大臣（6）×2
抽 2 留 1（手中暂 3 张）；其余 **2 张暗置**按任意顺序放回牌堆底。牌堆只剩 1 张 → 抽那张并放回 1 张。牌堆空 → 无效。结算大臣时伯爵夫人强制打出**不适用**。

### 国王（7）×1
与任意未出局玩家交换手牌。其余皆侍女 → 无效。

### 伯爵夫人（8）×1
打出无效果。手牌有国王/王子时**必须**打出；也可自愿打出。不要展示另一张。

### 公主（9）×1
因任何原因打出/弃掉 → 立即出局；导致弃掉她的牌之后续效果无效。

**提示：** 亮牌时点数最高，但被强制弃牌风险极高。

content.en:
A round ends when:

1. **Deck is empty** — still-in players reveal; **highest value** wins **1 ♥**. **Tie → all tied players each gain 1 ♥.**
2. **Only one player remains** — that player immediately gains **1 ♥**.

**Spy:** After round winner(s), if exactly one still-in player played/discarded Spy, they gain 1 ♥ (does not count as winning the round).

**Next round:** Previous winner goes first (if tied winners, pick randomly among them).

### Win the Game

First to enough ♥ wins; **multiple players can win simultaneously**.

| Players | ♥ needed |
|:-------:|:--------:|
| 2 | 6 |
| 3 | 5 |
| 4 | 4 |
| 5 | 3 |
| 6 | 3 |
content.zh:
本轮结束条件：

1. **牌堆已空** — 仍在局者亮牌；**点数最高**者得 **1 ♥**。**平局 → 所有并列者各得 1 ♥。**
2. **只剩一人在局** — 该玩家立即得 **1 ♥**。

**间谍：** 确定本轮胜者后，若仍在局者中恰好一人打出/弃过间谍，再得 1 ♥（不算赢得本轮）。

**下一轮：** 上一轮胜者先手（多人并列则在其中随机）。

### 整局胜利

集齐所需 ♥ 即胜；**可以多人同时获胜**。

| 人数 | 所需 ♥ |
|:----:|:------:|
| 2 | 6 |
| 3 | 5 |
| 4 | 4 |
| 5 | 3 |
| 6 | 3 |
